# Feature Request

Thanks for suggesting an improvement.

Use this template for new ideas, workflow improvements, or Web Editor feature requests.

## What would you like to improve?

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Which part does it affect?

- [ ] First-run onboarding
- [ ] Pencil MCP Mode
- [ ] Web Editor Mode
- [ ] Right-side editor panel
- [ ] Layer editing
- [ ] Hide / Done / Export behavior
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Examples or walkthroughs
- [ ] Other

## Why would this help?

Explain the user problem or use case.

## Who is this for?

Example:

- Windows users
- beginners
- designers
- coding-agent users
- Pencil MCP users
- browser-only users

## Public-safety check

Please confirm:

- [ ] This request does not include private files or private paths.
- [ ] This request does not include private chat logs.
- [ ] This request does not include client, student, or user materials.
- [ ] This request does not require copying another person's surface design.
- [ ] This request does not include unauthorized visual assets.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, links, or examples only if they are public-safe.
